(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects 
    b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 
    b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19
  )
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1 (height 1): b1 on table
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2 (height 2): b2 on table, b3 on b2
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (clear b3)
    
    ;; Tower 3 (height 2): b4 on table, b5 on b4
    (on-table b4)
    (on b5 b4)
    (clear b5)
    
    ;; Tower 4 (height 4): b6 on table, b7 on b6, b8 on b7, b9 on b8
    (on-table b6)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (on b9 b8)
    (clear b9)
    
    ;; Tower 5 (height 10): b10 on table, b11 on b10, ..., b19 on b18
    (on-table b10)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (on b13 b12)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (on b17 b16)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (clear b19)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 still on table (single block, no change needed)
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b3 on table, b2 on b3
      (on-table b3)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b5 on table, b4 on b5
      (on-table b5)
      (on b4 b5)
      (clear b4)
      
      ;; Tower 4 inverted: b9 on table, b8 on b9, b7 on b8, b6 on b7
      (on-table b9)
      (on b8 b9)
      (on b7 b8)
      (on b6 b7)
      (clear b6)
      
      ;; Tower 5 inverted: b19 on table, b18 on b19, ..., b10 on b11
      (on-table b19)
      (on b18 b19)
      (on b17 b18)
      (on b16 b17)
      (on b15 b16)
      (on b14 b15)
      (on b13 b14)
      (on b12 b13)
      (on b11 b12)
      (on b10 b11)
      (clear b10)
      
      ;; Arm is empty
      (arm-empty)
    )
  )
)

(define (problem blocksworld-invert-stacks)
  (:domain blocksworld)
  (:requirements :strips)
  (:objects b1 b2 b3 b4 b5 b6 b7 b8 b9 b10 b11 b12 b13 b14 b15 b16 b17 b18 b19 b20)
  (:init
    ;; Tower 1: height 1 (b1 on table)
    (on-table b1)
    (clear b1)
    
    ;; Tower 2: height 3 (b2-b3-b4, b2 on table)
    (on-table b2)
    (on b3 b2)
    (on b4 b3)
    (clear b4)
    
    ;; Tower 3: height 4 (b5-b6-b7-b8, b5 on table)
    (on-table b5)
    (on b6 b5)
    (on b7 b6)
    (on b8 b7)
    (clear b8)
    
    ;; Tower 4: height 4 (b9-b10-b11-b12, b9 on table)
    (on-table b9)
    (on b10 b9)
    (on b11 b10)
    (on b12 b11)
    (clear b12)
    
    ;; Tower 5: height 4 (b13-b14-b15-b16, b13 on table)
    (on-table b13)
    (on b14 b13)
    (on b15 b14)
    (on b16 b15)
    (clear b16)
    
    ;; Tower 6: height 4 (b17-b18-b19-b20, b17 on table)
    (on-table b17)
    (on b18 b17)
    (on b19 b18)
    (on b20 b19)
    (clear b20)
    
    ;; Arm is empty
    (arm-empty)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      ;; Tower 1 inverted: b1 on top
      (on-table b1)
      (clear b1)
      
      ;; Tower 2 inverted: b4-b3-b2, b4 on table
      (on-table b4)
      (on b3 b4)
      (on b2 b3)
      (clear b2)
      
      ;; Tower 3 inverted: b8-b7-b6-b5, b8 on table
      (on-table b8)
      (on b7 b8)

    rooma roomb roomc roomd - room
    ball1 ball2 ball3 ball4 ball5 - ball
    left right middle - gripper
  )
  (:init

    (room roomb)
    (room roomc)
    (room roomd)
    (ball ball1)
    (ball ball2)
    (ball ball3)
    (ball ball4)
    (ball ball5)
    (gripper left)
    (gripper right)
    (gripper middle)
    (at-robby rooma)
    (at ball1 rooma)
    (at ball2 rooma)
    (at ball3 rooma)
    (carry ball4 left)
    (carry ball5 right)
    (free middle)
  )
  (:goal
    (and
      (free left)
      (free right)
      (free middle)
      (at ball4 roomc)
      (at ball5 roomc)
      (at ball1 roomc)
      (at ball2 roomc)
      (at ball3 roomc)
    )
  )
)
